name: Click in Place 3qt Shallow Slim Plastic Storage Bin for Home and Office Organization Green Tint - Brightroom™
description:
Enjoy an efficient storage solution in your home with this 3-Quart Shallow Slim Bin from Brightroom™. Featuring a stackable design for compact spaces, this transparent shallow bin lets you easily see what you've stored inside. Designed in a slim shape, this storage box comes with two side integrated handles for easy carrying around, and it has a capacity of 3 quarts for ample storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
